rows.label: tev065601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Go Belg about the Larsians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Go Belg if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0001
rows.name:
I serve the Growth no longer, and
as such have no quarrel with you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0002
rows.name:
But still, it is not my place to judge you
friend or foe. Until Prince Jiarg wills
it, I cannot tell you about our people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0005
rows.name:
A human? Pah. I did not want your
kind to see such a pitiful display.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0006
rows.name:
When it comes to the sword, we can hold our own
against any. But as for medicine, we command not
even a fraction of the Growth's technology.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0007
rows.name:
Now that we stand alone, we lack
the faculties to cure even the
simple illness of a child.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0008
rows.name:
What are we to do? Must we surrender again
to those fiends just to save our own?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Go Belg for his thoughts on friendship treaties with xenoforms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Go Belg if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0009
rows.name:
Prince Jiarg has decided to
fight alongside humans![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0010
rows.name:
They fought valiantly during the clash
in White Woods, exhibiting strength
not only of body, but of character.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0011
rows.name:
I support our prince's
decision wholeheartedly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0014
rows.name: Hmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0015
rows.name:
That is strange. I swear that I have
seen your face somewhere before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0016
rows.name:
Have we met in battle? No...
It was something else.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0017
rows.name: Mmm... This is going to bother me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Go Belg for his thoughts on friendship treaties with xenoforms.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Go Belg if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0018
rows.name:
My respect for the old laws
dissuades me from embracing new
things. Call it a character flaw.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0019
rows.name:
Perhaps if I had been more open-minded, I
might have found a way to resist the Growth
instead of obeying like a meekling.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0020
rows.name:
But the young of Lars give me hope. Your
city may provide them new experience and
new ways to make our people stronger.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0021
rows.name:
As long as they remember to honor our
important traditions and duties as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0025
rows.name:
Gi Ziordo and Gi Ziorde are still
out there somewhere, pursuing
their quest of self-betterment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0026
rows.name:
But I know them. They may clash
along the journey, but they
will never part ways again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0027
rows.name: ...Hmm? What will I do?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0028
rows.name:
Well, many of my people have moved to NLA. I
suppose I will stay here and protect Prince
Jiarg while I wait for my pupils to return.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev065601_MSG0029
rows.name:
This is the final task for an old soldier, you
see. If any dare attack us, I will fight them until
this body ceases to obey my orders! Ha ha ha![ST:wait ]
